description_long: This is a single-story house with a rectangular footprint, situated on a grassy plot with a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. The house features a prominent black gable roof and white exterior walls, accented by a wooden porch at the front. The entryway is accessible via a short set of steps and is sheltered by the roof overhang. Windows are arranged in a linear, symmetrical fashion along the visible sides, providing natural light to the interior. The driveway curves gently from the street to the front porch, and the surrounding lawn adds a suburban residential feel. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of a ranch-style suburban home.
description: A single-story, white house with a black gable roof, wooden porch, and a paved driveway on a grassy lot. Symmetrical windows and a sheltered entryway define its suburban, ranch-style appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden porch, main entryway, and the start of the driveway on a grassy plot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, white exterior wall, symmetrical windows, and the full length of the black gable roof.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back of the house, the continuation of the grassy yard, and the driveway curving away.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the white wall, chimney, and the transition between the grassy and paved areas.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wooden porch with steps, sheltered by a roof overhang, and a simple front door.
